projects.title: Modeling Belt Clip
projects.description: Designs a custom belt clip using McMaster part 91290A115.

projects.title: Cardboard Marble Run
projects.description: Build a marble run out of cardboard

objectives.reason: This project was developed in cardboard using CAD (Cardboard-Aided Design). I learned techniques to manipulate and work with cardboard to complete projects.
Techniques such as scoring to bend, strategic use of hot-glue, and utilizing support structures to allow for specific routes were all used.
